stages.objective: Observe clustered fault bursts in constrained memory run.
stages.goal: Locate burst intervals and correlate them with access churn.
stages.theory_detail: Fault bursts emerge when active references exceed available resident capacity.

hints.concept: Burstiness is a signal of working-set mismatch.
hints.explicit: Identify burst segment in trace, then map accesses causing it.

stages.objective: Diagnose baseline burst severity and completion impact.
stages.goal: Pass required baseline checks before mitigation tuning.

hints.nudge: Check both fault and completion outputs.
hints.concept: A mitigation is only valid if progress still completes.
hints.explicit: Run to completion, then inspect total not-present faults and trace evidence.

stages.objective: Apply mitigation tuning and reduce burst pressure.
stages.goal: Reduce faults within limits while preserving completion checks.

hints.concept: Burst reduction should be measurable in fault counters.
hints.explicit: Change one config setting, rerun full scenario, and confirm fault_lte plus completion.
